scenarios.description: Close Combat (120 BP) converts to 190 Z-power via the 11-range Z-power table (ERRATA #15)
scenarios.note: Z-Move power lookup table: 120 BP → 190. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts getZMovePower ERRATA #15

scenarios.description: Thunderbolt (90 BP) converts to 175 Z-power via the Z-power table
scenarios.note: Z-Move power lookup table: 90 BP → 175. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts getZMovePower

scenarios.description: Flamethrower (90 BP) converts to 175 Z-power
scenarios.note: Z-Move power lookup table: 90 BP → 175. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts getZMovePower

scenarios.description: Fire Blast (110 BP) converts to 185 Z-power
scenarios.note: Z-Move power lookup table: 110 BP → 185. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts getZMovePower

scenarios.description: Water Pulse (60 BP) converts to 120 Z-power
scenarios.note: Z-Move power lookup table: 60 BP → 120. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts getZMovePower

scenarios.description: Extreme Speed (80 BP) converts to 160 Z-power
scenarios.note: Z-Move power lookup table: 80 BP → 160. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts getZMovePower

scenarios.description: Moves with 140+ BP cap at 200 Z-power
scenarios.note: Z-Move power cap: 130 BP → 195; 140+ BP → 200. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts getZMovePower

scenarios.description: Status Z-Moves grant a stat boost and do NOT become damage moves (ERRATA #16)
scenarios.note: Z-Curse (Snorlax) grants +1 Atk, +1 Def, +1 SpDef and remains a status move. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts ERRATA #16

scenarios.description: Z-Moves deal 25% damage through Protect
scenarios.note: Z-Moves bypass Protect at 25% power. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts ZMoveProtect

scenarios.description: Electric Terrain boosts Electric moves by 1.5x in Gen 7 (not 1.3x — ERRATA #17)
scenarios.note: Electric Terrain multiplier is 1.5x in Gen 7. Changed to 1.3x in Gen 8. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts ERRATA #17

scenarios.description: Grassy Terrain boosts Grass moves by 1.5x and heals grounded Pokemon 1/16 HP per turn
scenarios.note: Grassy Terrain: 1.5x Grass moves, 1/16 HP heal grounded, halves Earthquake/Bulldoze/Magnitude. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts GrassyTerrain

scenarios.description: Grassy Terrain halves the power of Earthquake, Bulldoze, and Magnitude
scenarios.note: Grassy Terrain: Earthquake, Bulldoze, Magnitude deal 50% damage. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts GrassyTerrain

scenarios.description: Misty Terrain halves Dragon-type damage vs grounded Pokemon (NOT all damage)
scenarios.note: Misty Terrain: halves Dragon damage vs grounded targets only. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts MistyTerrain

scenarios.description: Psychic Terrain blocks priority moves targeting grounded Pokemon
scenarios.note: Psychic Terrain: priority moves targeting grounded Pokemon fail. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts PsychicTerrain

scenarios.description: Parental Bond second hit deals 25% in Gen 7 (nerfed from Gen 6's 50% — ERRATA #12)
scenarios.note: Parental Bond Gen 7: second hit = 0.25× first hit. Gen 6 was 0.5×. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts ERRATA #12

scenarios.description: Paralysis reduces Speed by 50% in Gen 7 (was 25% reduction = 75% speed in Gen 1-6 — ERRATA #14)
scenarios.note: Gen 7: paralyzed Speed = floor(baseSpeed / 2). Previously was floor(speed * 0.75). Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts ERRATA #14

scenarios.description: Disguise (Mimikyu) absorbs one hit and form changes from Disguised to Busted
scenarios.note: Disguise: absorbs first hit (ignores damage), Mimikyu changes to Busted form. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/abilities.ts Disguise

scenarios.description: Gale Wings grants +1 priority to Flying moves ONLY when user is at full HP in Gen 7 (ERRATA #13)
scenarios.note: Gale Wings Gen 7: full HP required for +1 priority. Gen 6 had no HP requirement. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/abilities.ts ERRATA #13

scenarios.description: Gale Wings grants +1 priority to Flying moves when user is at full HP
scenarios.note: Gale Wings Gen 7 at full HP: +1 priority granted. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/abilities.ts ERRATA #13

scenarios.description: Ultra Burst transforms Necrozma-Dawn/Dusk-Wings to Ultra Necrozma when holding Ultranecrozium Z
scenarios.note: Ultra Burst: Necrozma-DW or Necrozma-DM + Ultranecrozium Z → Ultra Necrozma. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/abilities.ts UltraBurst

scenarios.description: Beast Boost raises the user's highest stat by +1 stage when it KOs a Pokemon
scenarios.note: Beast Boost: KO grants +1 to highest non-HP stat. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/abilities.ts BeastBoost

scenarios.description: Dark-type Pokemon are immune to Prankster-boosted status moves in Gen 7+ (ERRATA)
scenarios.note: Prankster-boosted moves targeting Dark-type Pokemon fail in Gen 7+. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/abilities.ts Prankster

scenarios.description: Confusion self-hit chance is 33% in Gen 7 (was 50% in Gen 1-6 — ERRATA #4)
scenarios.note: Gen 7: confusion self-hit = 1/3 chance. Gen 1-6 was 1/2. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts ERRATA #4
